content.full_text:
June 11, 2002

Barbara A. Stewart, City Clerk
City of Dorris
Post Office Box 768
Dorris, CA 96023

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-043

Dear Ms. Stewart:

Pursuant to the telephone message we received on June 7, 2002, from Mr. Dave Clark on behalf of Councilwoman Maria Clark, this letter confirms that your request seeking advice on behalf of a City of Dorris council member regarding the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act is withdrawn.

If you have any additional questions, please feel free to call our office toll-free at (866) 275-3772.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Kenneth L. Glick
Counsel, Legal Division

cc: Maria Clark
P.O. Box 408
Dorris, CA 96023

KLG:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\02-043
